title: Establish Backrest/restic restore gate
goal: Turn the existing restic installation into a verified backup/restore baseline and decide whether Backrest should be added as the local UI/orchestrator.

acceptance.assertion: Existing restic version, repositories, environment assumptions and exclude rules are documented without exposing secrets.
At least one snapshot target set is defined for repos, Bureau registry, Lenskit/RepoBrief artifacts and selected documents.
At least one single-file restore probe is executed or explicitly blocked with the missing prerequisite recorded.
Backrest, if added, is bound only to localhost or Tailnet and does not expose repository credentials in logs or repo files.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Infra PR #107 GitHub CI validate passed.
scripts/utilities/heim-utilities-smoke.sh reported Backrest, Beszel, Stirling PDF, Paperless, Atuin, Difftastic, rga and LocalSend OK.
Restic util-base-v1 snapshot and single-file restore probe passed.
Paperless imported synthetic PDF document id 1 and indexed content containing UTIL-BASE-V1.
Stirling PDF converted the probe PDF to text and merged two copies into a 2-page PDF.
Docling 2.111.0 converted the probe PDF to Markdown and JSON with UTIL-BASE-V1 content.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in infra PR #107 and live-smoked on heim-pc; see runtime evidence for exact boundaries and remaining manual steps.

verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t002-1: Restic version and local repository/password-file assumptions are documented without committed secrets.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t002-2: Snapshot target includes Bureau queue, infra runbook index and synthetic probe file.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t002-3: Single-file restore probe passed with sha256 comparison.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t002-4: Backrest runs only on 127.0.0.1:9898; no repository credentials were committed.
